profile.name: Nguyen Thanh Dat
profile.school: Final-year Information Technology students at Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry

commerce-2.a: This intelligent workspace web application allows users to input commands and display dynamic content in intuitive panels. The interface is designed to be modern, optimizing the user experience with flexible interaction and real-time data display.
commerce-2.b: Build a responsive UI using React + TypeScript
commerce-2.d: Integrate a REST API to retrieve and display product data
commerce-2.f: Implement CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) functions via API
commerce-2.g: Manage application state using Context API / Hook

booking.a: The website is an online appointment scheduling system, allowing users to quickly search for medical services, view information, and book appointments. The application provides a user-friendly interface that is easy to use and optimized for multiple devices. The administration system supports data management and interacts with APIs to process dynamic information.
booking.b: Developed responsive user interfaces using React and TypeScript
booking.c: Designed booking interface for healthcare services
booking.d: Integrate a REST API to retrieve and display product data
booking.e: Integrated RESTful APIs for dynamic data rendering
booking.f: Implemented booking features and data management (CRUD)
booking.g: Manage application state using Context API / Zustand

portfolio.a: Portfolio cá nhân được phát triển bằng React và TypeScript, nhằm trình bày kỹ năng và các dự án thực tế. Ứng dụng sử dụng kiến trúc component tái sử dụng, hỗ trợ responsive UI, dark/light mode và tối ưu trải nghiệm người dùng. Website giúp thể hiện khả năng xây dựng giao diện hiện đại và quản lý cấu trúc frontend hiệu quả.
portfolio.b: Developed a personal portfolio using React and TypeScript
portfolio.c: Designed a modern multi-section layout (Home, Skills, Projects, Contact)
portfolio.d: Built reusable UI components (Button, Card, Skill Item, Project Item)
portfolio.e: Implemented responsive design for multiple devices
portfolio.h: Improved UI/UX with animations and user-friendly interactions
portfolio.i: Managed application state (theme, language, display data)

about.hi: Hello, I'm Nguyen Thanh Dat from Ho Chi Minh City.
about.school: I am currently a final-year Information Technology student at Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City.
about.skills: Experienced in ReactJS, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, with a strong focus on building responsive and high-performance user interfaces.
about.experience: I have worked on several personal projects such as portfolio websites, management systems, and real-world web applications, helping me improve both development skills and UI/UX thinking.
about.strengths: Strong self-learning ability, logical thinking, proactive attitude, and a continuous effort to improve product quality.
about.goal: Seeking an opportunity to work in a professional environment to develop my skills, gain practical experience, and contribute to real-world projects.
